text: Developing a mobile app requires several important decisions. First, responsive design ensures the app looks and works well on different screen sizes, from small phones to tablets. Next, you must choose between native and cross-platform development. Native apps are built specifically for iOS or Android, offering better performance and full access to device features. Cross-platform tools like React Native allow code reuse across both platforms, saving time but sometimes affecting performance. Finally, you need to publish your app on app stores like Google Play and the Apple App Store, where it must meet their guidelines. Regular updates help maintain performance and user satisfaction.
